## What changed

Describe the user-visible outcome and why this scope is appropriate.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `make test-community` (or explained why it is not applicable).
- [ ] I ran `make verify` for build, storage, privacy, dependency, or release changes.
- [ ] I checked English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and Japanese where UI text changed.

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] This change adds no undisclosed network request, telemetry, credential access, or data upload.
- [ ] No private audio, transcript, project content, path, credential, model, or generated build artifact is included.
- [ ] Text insertion/correction failure remains non-destructive where applicable.

## UI changes

Add redacted screenshots or a short recording when useful. Use invented text only.
